commit.message:
feat(bsatn): add BSATN binary codec, schema DSL, and binary protocol

SpacetimeDB.BSATN — complete binary codec
- All primitives: u8/16/32/64/128, i8/16/32/64/128, f32/f64, bool
- Compound types: string (u32 len-prefix), bytes, option, array
- Generic encode/2 and decode/2 dispatch by type atom or schema module

SpacetimeDB.BSATN.Schema — macro DSL for table row schemas
- bsatn_schema do ... end generates struct + encode/1 + decode/1 + fields/0
- bsatn_sum do ... end generates u8-discriminant tagged union encode/decode
- Supports nested schemas, {:array, T}, {:option, T} field types

SpacetimeDB.Protocol.BSATN — v1.bsatn.spacetimedb message framing
- All client→server messages encoded as BSATN binary frames (tags 0–5)
- All server→client messages decoded from binary frames (tags 0–8)
- Row data surfaced as raw binaries for schema-based decoding

75 tests total, 0 failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 발생현황 탭 BUG-2, BUG-3 수정

BUG-2: 카드 클릭 시 NO DATA 오류
- 문제: 'no_action' 문자열이 falsy 체크(!i.actionStatus) 통과 못함
- 문제: selectedStatus === 'partial' 필터 분기 없음
- 해결: primaryFilter 통합 + 명시적 'no_action' 체크 추가
- 해결: partial 필터 추가 (발생현황은 항상 0)

BUG-3: 부분완료 카드가 하드코딩된 0
- 문제: stats.partial이 계산되지 않음
- 해결1: stats 계산에 partial: 0 추가
- 해결2: 부분완료 카드 값을 stats.partial로 변경

발생현황 탭은 한 항공사 관점이므로:
- completed: 해당 항공사가 조치함
- inProgress/no_action: 미조치
- partial: 개념적으로 불가능 (다른 항공사 정보 없음) → 항상 0

다음: 방안 A (동기화 함수 중앙화) 진행 예정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Always use VLM for cross-session node dedup, remove label-overlap gate

- Drop label Jaccard threshold from 0.4 → 0.1 (only skip zero-overlap pairs)
- Remove label-only fallback merge (overlap >= 0.7 with no screenshots) —
  skip instead of risking a false merge on label similarity alone
- VLM screenshot comparison is now always the decision-maker when screenshots
  exist, regardless of how different the labels look

commit.message:
Fix patternProperties validation to apply to all properties (#1898)

patternProperties was only validated against additional properties (those
not in the schema's properties collection). Per JSON Schema spec,
patternProperties should be evaluated against all object properties.

Fixes #1736

GitHub Actions サイトマップ自動化・IndexNow連携

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix delivery days WEEKDAY format: send integers instead of abbreviations

Priority returns WEEKDAY as integers (Sun=1, Mon=2, ..., Sat=7) but
we were sending 3-letter abbreviations ("Mon", "Thu"). This caused the
GET+compare optimization to never match existing records, resulting in
unnecessary writes on every sync run — wasting the 10K monthly write quota.

Renamed abbreviate_day() → day_to_priority_int() and updated tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add GitHub Pages deployment workflow

Deploys experiment/ directory to GitHub Pages on push to main.
Injects Firebase config from repository secret FIREBASE_CONFIG_JSON
so credentials stay out of version control.

GitHub Actions サイトマップ自動化・IndexNow連携

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

worker: always output silent audio when no voiceover to fix concat amix

When GPT sets voiceoverText="" for a scene, the composite step produces a
video-only clip with no audio stream. The render step's [0:a] amix reference
then fails on those clips during final stitching.

Fix: add anullsrc silent audio as input 1 when no voiceover, so every clip
always has an audio stream regardless of whether GPT included narration.

    Layer 1: Solid deity-colored dot (r=3, ~8px)
    Layer 2: Gold border ring (#C8962E, strokeWidth=0.7)
    Layer 3: Pulsating glow (r=7, ~22px, deity color @ 15-35% opacity)
- Clean up: move Text import to top, extract GridLines as component

feat: build complete notification system with Slack integration

- Rewrite lib/slack.ts with Block Kit messages, rate limiting (1/lead/60min), retry with exponential backoff, dual webhook support (SLACK_WEBHOOK_ALERTS + SLACK_WEBHOOK_SYSTEM)
- Create lib/notifications.ts as centralized notification hub (in-app + Slack routing, DND support, settings caching)
- Add /api/workers/notifications worker endpoint for hot_lead, call_booked, setter_offline, ai_takeover events
- Create NotificationBell component with pulsing badge and configurable sound alerts
- Update settings/notifications page with dual webhook config, per-type toggles, sound settings, DND hours
- Add notification_settings table to schema + migration 004
- Refactor all existing workers (process, autopilot, calendly, transfer) to use centralized createNotification()
- Update .env.local.example with SLACK_WEBHOOK_ALERTS and SLACK_WEBHOOK_SYSTEM

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace tab characters with spaces in diff rendering

Tabs in source code (e.g., Go) caused garbled display because ratatui
treats tabs as 1-width characters while terminals render them wider.

Fix Vercel deployment: specify Node.js 22+ in engines

Next.js 16.1.6 requires Node.js 22+. Without the engines field,
Vercel may use an older Node version causing the build to fail.

Next.js App Router 파일 컨벤션(app/apple-icon.png 등)이
캐시 버스팅 해시를 포함한 URL을 자동 생성하도록 변경.

via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

add automated flake updates and NixOS auto-upgrade

Increase retrain timeout from 2h to 4h for OOF cross-validation

The 5-fold OOF meta-learner training multiplies base model training
time, causing the previous 2-hour limit to be hit consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(error): DB 문제풀이 메모·해설 API 500 에러 수정 — 지연 로딩 적용

--- debug-note ---
symptom:

* DB 문제풀이 페이지에서 메모·해설 API 전부 500 에러
* AI 해설 저장도 500 에러로 실패

root-cause:

* 110+ 카드 렌더링 시 각 카드마다 메모·해설 API 동시 호출 (220+ 요청)
* Supabase 동시 연결 한도 초과

fix:

* 메모·해설을 카드 열릴 때 지연 로딩(lazy load)으로 변경 (최초 1회만)
* createMemoArea에서 즉시 fetch 제거, _loadMemos 함수로 분리
* loadAndRenderDbExplanations를 header click 핸들러 안으로 이동
* DB 커넥션 풀 max 5 → 2로 축소 (서버리스 최적화)

verify:

* 콘솔 로그에서 500 에러 대량 발생 확인 후 원인 분석
--- /debug-note ---

repository.name: techplay
repository.description: gaming portal

commit.message:
LIQ_PROXIMITY: rank by volume, skip 50x/100x noise, show leverage in title

- Skip leverage > 25x (50x, 100x are 1-2% noise, not real clusters)
- Rank clusters by USD volume instead of distance — largest cluster wins
- Widen proximity radius from 3% to 5% to catch 25x clusters (~4% away)
- Title now shows leverage + volume: "10x short cluster $3.05 ($12.5M)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add typing indicator and mark-as-read for bot responses

- markAsRead(messageId) on each incoming message so user sees blue ticks immediately
- sendTypingIndicator(to, durationMs) shown during all inter-message delays:
  node.delayMs/delaySeconds, video followup delay, auto-advance delay, AI preface delay
- Both calls are fire-and-forget (silently ignored if unsupported)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
